title: koanophyllon hidrodes
side_effects: Koanophyllon hidrodes can have side effects if used improperly, such as nausea, dizziness, and headaches due to its high concentration of glycosides. Prolonged use or excessive consumption can lead to stomach ulcers, diarrhea, and vomiting. In severe cases, improper use of koanophyllon hidrodes may also cause heart palpitations, arrhythmias, and even respiratory failure. It is essential to consult a medical professional before using this plant for health benefits to avoid these adverse side effects.
